phrases.text_local: Onde fica a escadaria dos Paços do Concelho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DOOSH PAH-soosh DOO koong-SEH-lyoo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um lojista ou no quiosque de informação turística.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a shop owner or at the tourist information kiosk.

responses.english: Ask a shop owner or at the tourist information kiosk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um lojista ou no quiosque de informação turística.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see calçada portuguesa
phrases.text_local: Onde é que posso ver calçada portuguesa aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH PAW-soo VEHR kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Calçada portuguesa features intricate black and white stone patterns unique to Portuguese urban design.

likely_response.local: Pode ver calçada portuguesa nas calçadas e fachadas das lojas ao longo da rua.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih VEHR kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh NUHSH kahl-SAH-duhsh EH fuh-SHAH-duhsh DUHSH LOH-zhuhsh OW LOHNG-goo DUH ROOUH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can see Portuguese pavement on the sidewalks and shop facades along the street.

responses.english: You can see Portuguese pavement on the sidewalks and shop facades along the street.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih VEHR kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh NUHSH kahl-SAH-duhsh EH fuh-SHAH-duhsh DUHSH LOH-zhuhsh OW LOHNG-goo DUH ROOUH.
responses.french: Pode ver calçada portuguesa nas calçadas e fachadas das lojas ao longo da rua.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço do Café Paris?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH puh-REESH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço do Café Paris.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH puh-REESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Café Paris terrace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Café Paris terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH puh-REESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o terraço do Café Paris.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the town hall steps are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam exatamente os degraus dos Paços do Concelho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih OOSH dihg-ROWSH DOOSH PAH-soosh DOO koong-SEH-lyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Paços do Concelho steps are a traditional meeting point overlooking Cascais bay.

likely_response.local: Os degraus estão sinalizados. Siga as placas para os Paços do Concelho ou pergunte a um segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH dihg-ROWSH ihsh-TOWN see-nuh-lee-ZAH-doosh. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH PAH-soosh DOO koong-SEH-lyoo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: The steps are clearly marked. Follow the signs for the Paços do Concelho or ask a security guard.

responses.english: The steps are clearly marked. Follow the signs for the Paços do Concelho or ask a security guard.
responses.phonetic: OOSH dihg-ROWSH ihsh-TOWN see-nuh-lee-ZAH-doosh. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH PAH-soosh DOO koong-SEH-lyoo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Os degraus estão sinalizados. Siga as placas para os Paços do Concelho ou pergunte a um segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see calçada portuguesa
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a calçada portuguesa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Calçada portuguesa is the traditional Portuguese pavement mosaic, often found in historic areas like Rua da Liberdade.

likely_response.local: No chão, em toda a rua.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO SHOWN, AYNG TOH-duh AH ROOUH.
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground, all along the street.

responses.english: On the ground, all along the street.
responses.phonetic: NOO SHOWN, AYNG TOH-duh AH ROOUH.
responses.french: No chão, em toda a rua.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the tourist info kiosk
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o quiosque de informações turísticas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist kiosks in Cascais provide maps and event schedules for the historic center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque de informações turísticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the tourist information kiosk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the tourist information kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o quiosque de informações turísticas.
